mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, ID_NUMBER, TRUCK_NO, DRIVER, TEL, STATUS FROM T_WEIGHT_PLAN_ITEM
id = #{id}
SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, ID_NUMBER, TRUCK_NO, DRIVER, TEL, STATUS FROM T_WEIGHT_PLAN_ITEM WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WEIGHT_PLAN_ITEM( ID, PARENT_ID, ID_NUMBER, TRUCK_NO, DRIVER, TEL, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{truckNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{driver, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_WEIGHT_PLAN_ITEM SET PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ID_NUMBER = #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRUCK_NO = #{truckNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DRIVER = #{driver,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEL = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
